sizing_rule.note: Position size = 0 (no trading) when A ≤ 1. This is a hard floor rule: if arithmetic mean HPR does not exceed 1.0, expected value is non-positive and trading should not occur regardless of other factors.

source_rule_text: Do not trade if arithmetic average HPR (A) is less than or equal to 1, as mathematical expectation will be non-positive and profits approach zero regardless of standard deviation or number of trades.
